Notice Of Motion And Motion For New Trial
Off Calendar Dec-30-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Prows, Esq. 415-402-2708 of Briscoe Ivester & Bazel LLP for Petitioner.
Brian Crossman, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4690 of the Office of the City Attorney for Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D. Petitioner Argues. Respondent responds. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SAFE EMBARCADERO FOR ALL's Motion For New Trial.

The Court adopts the tenative ruling. Petitioner's motion for new trial is denied. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for full details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus; Memorandum
Off Calendar Nov-22-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Prows, Esq.of Briscoe Ivester & Bazel LLP 415-402-2701 for Petitioner.
James Emery, Deputy City Attorney, and Brian Crossman, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4700, Office of the City Attorney for Defendant City and County of San Francisco et al.
Matthew Struhar, Deputy Attorney General, 916-210-7246, Shari Posner, Deputy Attorney General, 510-879-0856, Elise Stokes, Deputy Attorney General, 916-210-6201 of the Office of the Attorney General for Respondent State Lands Commission.

Deputy City Attorney Crossman and Deputy Attorney General Struhar argues. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER SAFE EMBARCADERO FOR ALL's Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandamus.

Taken Under Submission. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Order To Show Cause - Petitioner Safe Embarcadero For All'S Application For Stay
Off Calendar Sep-23-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Prows, Esq., John Briscoe, Esq. of Briscoe Ivester & Bazel LLP 415-402-2701 for Petitioner.
James Emery, Deputy City Attorney, and Brian Crossman, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4700, Office of the City Attorney for Defendant City and County of San Francisco et al.
Matthew Struhar, Deputy Attorney General, 916-210-7246, Shari Posner, Deputy Attorney General, 510-879-0856 of the Office of the Attorney General for Respondent State Lands Commission; Defendant State of California.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court shares its views and asks questions. All sides argue. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

2:13 The Court takes a 5 minute recess.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order To Show Cause - Petitioner Safe Embarcadero For All's Application For Stay.

Denied. The Court denies the request for an injunction and a stay of the Port Commissioner's decision approving the MOU with the city, for reasons stated on the record. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

The Court will prepare an Order.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
